titles.title: Take Me to the End of Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: With eyes of mercy Gazed upon this broken soul In this empty cup pour out Your grace Until it overflows

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Search every motive Mold this heart as You desire Every passion that brings pain to You Be consumed by Your fire

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take me to the End of utmost affection For the things that take Your place Take me to the End of this secret kingdom I have treasured and embraced Let all desire burn and longing turn to dust if not for You Set me free Take me to the end of me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And if this heart fails I would choose to hold on still To the certainty of Your sovereign love I will rest my hope until…
